svg.text: TF-IDF · CHUNKING · SENTENCE TRANSFORMERS · HNSW · LSH · CAG · CONTEXT ENG. · GUARDRAILS
BLOCK → return error immediately · REDACT → sanitise query · WARN → attach warning to response
PASS → proceed to retrieval with (possibly sanitised) query
Ordered: fail fast on hardest blocks (length → injection → toxic → PII → topic → rate)
⚡ OUTPUT GUARDRAILS (run after generation, before returning to user)
no source ref in long answer
WARN → attach warning to response · REDACT → replace answer with scrubbed version
All output guards run on every response · warnings shown in red in Web Chat UI
Output guards NEVER block — they warn and optionally sanitise
